  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["deviceEui","health"],"properties":{"deviceEui":{"type":"string"},"health":{"type":"object","properties":{"overall":{"type":"number"}}},"issues":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object"}},"batteryDrain":{"type":"object"},"perGatewayMetrics":{"type":"object"},"messageCount24h":{"type":"number"},"generatedAt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}}}}}}}
>
